organizationDescription:
Established in 2016 Green Scene Energy is dedicated to delivering affordable, high-quality clean energy solutions to off-grid and weak-grid communities in Ethiopia and across Africa. The products offered by Green Scene are namely; Solar Home Systems and lighting products, Productive Use / Irrigation solutions and EPC services for mini grids installations.
To reach its customers Green Scene Energy partners with retailers, micro finance institutions, telecom operators and farmers associations to distribute the products using pay-as-you-go (PAYGO) financing mechanism.
Starting operations in 2016, Green Scene has sold over 9,000 solar energy products in SNNPR, Amhara and Oromia regions of the Ethiopia. The target markets in the next five years is reaching 600,000 Households across all regions.


Our exceptional expertise, extensive partner network, and local presence ensure that our fully integrated process sustainably meets our clients energy needs:
- Simple-to-use products that work
- Post-distribution product traceability to ensure compliance with carbon credit regulations
- Affordable, flexible payment options and 
- Customizable solutions for a variety of contexts

Our Business Model
The company introduced a new business model named SETT (Solar Energy by Tele Transfer / ) leveraging its partnership with the national telecommunications provider, Ethio Telecom, to pilot, expand and accelerate the availability and affordability of pay-as-you-go (PAYG)-enabled solar systems to off-grid customers for a wide variety of productive uses including lighting, device charging, radio, television, refrigeration and water pumping for irrigation.

Our work Impact: addresses 10 out of 17 Sustainable Development Goals

organizationDescription:
Appable is an up and coming technology firm based in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia. We have been producing world-class quality software, website, and mobile apps for our clients since 2017. We are dedicated to ensuring our products simplify our clients jobs, by making intelligent and powerful software. Our commitment to the continuous advancement of our intellect and expertise helps us accomplish our success through the pursuit of elevated performance and quality. We believe our job is to listen, research, and understand the requirements unique to each individual business.

Our Story

It all started in 2004 with four brothers who were on a mission to deliver the best quality IT solutions, advertising, and graphics design services. This mission led them to establish a company called Afrolink Studio. After working on this for six years, they decided to split the company as it was increasingly growing and getting immersed in diverse sectors. Afrolink was split into one company that gave IT solutions, and another that provided graphics design services. The two companies were named Yesakor Technologies and Design Lab respectively. 

After a while Yesakor was re-branded as Appable Technologies PLC, with all the services and company structures polished to ensure a final and stable technology company. Our story started as Afrolink, moved through Yesakor, and finally, brought us here, where we intend to stay

organizationDescription:
Established in 2016 Green Scene Energy is dedicated to delivering affordable, high-quality clean energy solutions to off-grid and weak-grid communities in Ethiopia and across Africa. The products offered by Green Scene are namely; Solar Home Systems and lighting products, Productive Use / Irrigation solutions and EPC services for mini grids installations.
To reach its customers Green Scene Energy partners with retailers, micro finance institutions, telecom operators and farmers associations to distribute the products using pay-as-you-go (PAYGO) financing mechanism.
Starting operations in 2016, Green Scene has sold over 9,000 solar energy products in SNNPR, Amhara and Oromia regions of the Ethiopia. The target markets in the next five years is reaching 600,000 Households across all regions.


Our exceptional expertise, extensive partner network, and local presence ensure that our fully integrated process sustainably meets our clients energy needs:
- Simple-to-use products that work
- Post-distribution product traceability to ensure compliance with carbon credit regulations
- Affordable, flexible payment options and 
- Customizable solutions for a variety of contexts

Our Business Model
The company introduced a new business model named SETT (Solar Energy by Tele Transfer / ) leveraging its partnership with the national telecommunications provider, Ethio Telecom, to pilot, expand and accelerate the availability and affordability of pay-as-you-go (PAYG)-enabled solar systems to off-grid customers for a wide variety of productive uses including lighting, device charging, radio, television, refrigeration and water pumping for irrigation.

Our work Impact: addresses 10 out of 17 Sustainable Development Goals

We are a $560m enterprise based in Washington, DC, operating in the private and public sectors in more than 65 countries.

organizationDescription:
We are Population Services International (PSI), the worlds leading non-profit social marketing organization. We work to make it easier for people in the developing world to lead healthier lives and plan the families they desire by marketing affordable products and services that range from mosquito nets to contraceptives to HIV testing. We are a $560m enterprise based in Washington, DC, operating in the private and public sectors in more than 65 countries.

PSI Ethiopia is an innovative network member of PSI with a team of more than 140 people passionate about marketing and dedicated to serving Sara! Since 2003, we have marketed products and led programs to prevent HIV, improve reproductive health, and improve child health.  We market condoms and increase condom use among people most at risk of HIV.  We increase access to clean water by selling Wuha Agar, a water disinfectant. At PSI Ethiopia we do more than simply provide products and services, we seek to create true change  buy making markets work for the poor  to increase the use of critical health products and services that are available, affordable, and desirable to the most vulnerable Ethiopian people
organizationSpecialities: Health ,NGO,Social Marketing,WASH,HIV/AIDS Prevention,Reproductive Health,Adolescents,Hypertension,NCD,Family Planning,and Marketing

From free embedded logistics advisory to delivery of consignments from Djibouti to warehouses in Addis Ababa from 7 to 13 days and daily status update to clients, Shayashone Logistics (SSL) is one of the key players in the sector. 
In a dynamic and fast changing world of the development consultancy business, Shayashone (SSC) is one of the swiftly emerging corporate and development consultancies in Ethiopia. 
Introducing SMS service to facilitate market information amongst smallholder farmers and the agricultural community as a whole, Shayashone Agricultural Market Information (SAMIS) is paving a way to a new era in the communication sector. 
This is the place where Speed, Flexibility, Quality and Afford-ability meet to provide first class service. 
Come and make your business decision with us by your side

organizationDescription:
We are Population Services International (PSI), the worlds leading non-profit social marketing organization. We work to make it easier for people in the developing world to lead healthier lives and plan the families they desire by marketing affordable products and services that range from mosquito nets to contraceptives to HIV testing. We are a $560m enterprise based in Washington, DC, operating in the private and public sectors in more than 65 countries.

PSI Ethiopia is an innovative network member of PSI with a team of more than 140 people passionate about marketing and dedicated to serving Sara! Since 2003, we have marketed products and led programs to prevent HIV, improve reproductive health, and improve child health.  We market condoms and increase condom use among people most at risk of HIV.  We increase access to clean water by selling Wuha Agar, a water disinfectant. At PSI Ethiopia we do more than simply provide products and services, we seek to create true change  buy making markets work for the poor  to increase the use of critical health products and services that are available, affordable, and desirable to the most vulnerable Ethiopian people
organizationSpecialities: Health ,NGO,Social Marketing,WASH,HIV/AIDS Prevention,Reproductive Health,Adolescents,Hypertension,NCD,Family Planning,and Marketing

organizationDescription:
Established in 2016 Green Scene Energy is dedicated to delivering affordable, high-quality clean energy solutions to off-grid and weak-grid communities in Ethiopia and across Africa. The products offered by Green Scene are namely; Solar Home Systems and lighting products, Productive Use / Irrigation solutions and EPC services for mini grids installations.
To reach its customers Green Scene Energy partners with retailers, micro finance institutions, telecom operators and farmers associations to distribute the products using pay-as-you-go (PAYGO) financing mechanism.
Starting operations in 2016, Green Scene has sold over 9,000 solar energy products in SNNPR, Amhara and Oromia regions of the Ethiopia. The target markets in the next five years is reaching 600,000 Households across all regions.


Our exceptional expertise, extensive partner network, and local presence ensure that our fully integrated process sustainably meets our clients energy needs:
- Simple-to-use products that work
- Post-distribution product traceability to ensure compliance with carbon credit regulations
- Affordable, flexible payment options and 
- Customizable solutions for a variety of contexts

Our Business Model
The company introduced a new business model named SETT (Solar Energy by Tele Transfer / ) leveraging its partnership with the national telecommunications provider, Ethio Telecom, to pilot, expand and accelerate the availability and affordability of pay-as-you-go (PAYG)-enabled solar systems to off-grid customers for a wide variety of productive uses including lighting, device charging, radio, television, refrigeration and water pumping for irrigation.

Our work Impact: addresses 10 out of 17 Sustainable Development Goals

organizationDescription: PurposeBlack is a new initiative launched in May 2020 through a collaborative effort of more than 130 Black experts. As the name indicates, PurposeBlack intends to economically resolve some of the principal issues Black people worldwide face. Preparation is well underway to launch the first model of this global initiative in Ethiopia.We strongly believe that the new approach is an excellent opportunity for Ethiopia and Africa to be at the center of a massive international enterprise while benefiting millions of Africans in the process. The PurposeBlack Ethiopia initiative will be a multi-billion Birr endeavor encompassing the construction and launching of a mega agro-processing complex, an e-commerce marketplace, five hypermarkets, ten big supermarkets, a chain of more than 1000 retail and distribution stores all over Ethiopia, and multiple agricultural endeavors established by joint ventures with farmers throughout the country

organizationDescription:
Initiative for Peace and Development (IPAD) is an independent, non-partisan and non-profit organization working in Pakistan on the issues associated with peace and development. It is established in 2015 under Trust Act of 1882 with an approach to focus on the issues of peace and development and will see no bounds by working all over Pakistan.

IPAD associates belong to development/humanitarian sector and committed for peaceful and developed society. It is an initiative to promote social responsibility, peaceful environment and to realize inclusive and sustainable development. Our primary focus includes; promotion of impartial and inclusive quality education, gender equity, health, economic growth and capacity building. 

VISION:

To become leaders in the peace building and to promote life-long learning opportunities for all.

MISSION:

IPAD is an initiative, to promote peaceful and comprehensive societies for sustainable development through impartial quality education and capacity building, and to provide access to learning for all and build effective, accountable and inclusive institutions at all levels.

CORE VALUES:

 Respect for the Individual
 Trustworthy
 Teamwork
 Results-Oriented

OBJECTIVES:

 Address the causes and effects of conflict and strengthen existing mechanisms for conflict prevention and resolution
 Advocate for legal and civil society structures necessary for peace development process
 Support the education sector to address social exclusion and promote social cohesion
 Increase livelihood opportunities through skills building for groups at risk of conflict
 Empowering women to support themselves
organizationSpecialities: Quality Education,Health,Gender Equity & Women Empowerment,Economic Growth,Peace and Stability,Water Supply and Sanitation,and Climate Change

organizationName: Addis Ababa Chamber of Commerce and Sectoral Associations
organizationDescription:
Background
Established in 1947, AACCSA is a voluntary, non-governmental, business membership organization with more than 18,000 member companies. The chamber serves as a credible voice of business and advocates for the creation of a conducive business environment. It also promotes trade and industry, disseminating business information, consulting government and members on economic development and business issues, establishing friendly relationship with similar chambers in other countries, and exchanging information as well as engaging in arbitration in times of disputes among businesses.

Vision Statement
To be a world class chamber, enabling the business community to be competitive locally and internationally and contribute to the attainment of the trade and investment goals of the country.

Mission Statement
To promote trade and investment by providing demand driven services to the best satisfaction of members, stakeholders and others and advocate for favorable business environment based on best practices.

Values
AACCSAs Core Values  are the heart of all that it does and are reflected in the day to day activities of AACCSA are promoted consistently by the Board and staff.

-Accountable, credible and transparent ;
-Business-friendly;
-Customer-focused;
-Innovative through creativity;
-Quality and improvement driven;
-Socially responsible;
-Team oriented;

Membership Benefits
-Business information and advice
-Business match making
-Market Access
-Networking Opportunities
-Sector specific support  :
-Business Promotion
-Training
-Arbitration Service
-Accreditation
-Improved Management System
organizationSpecialities: Member-based,Business Info,Training,Arbitration,Corporate Governance,Trade Fair,Advocacy,and Media and Communication

organizationName: Addis Ababa Chamber of Commerce and Sectoral Associations
organizationDescription:
Background
Established in 1947, AACCSA is a voluntary, non-governmental, business membership organization with more than 18,000 member companies. The chamber serves as a credible voice of business and advocates for the creation of a conducive business environment. It also promotes trade and industry, disseminating business information, consulting government and members on economic development and business issues, establishing friendly relationship with similar chambers in other countries, and exchanging information as well as engaging in arbitration in times of disputes among businesses.

Vision Statement
To be a world class chamber, enabling the business community to be competitive locally and internationally and contribute to the attainment of the trade and investment goals of the country.

Mission Statement
To promote trade and investment by providing demand driven services to the best satisfaction of members, stakeholders and others and advocate for favorable business environment based on best practices.

Values
AACCSAs Core Values  are the heart of all that it does and are reflected in the day to day activities of AACCSA are promoted consistently by the Board and staff.

-Accountable, credible and transparent ;
-Business-friendly;
-Customer-focused;
-Innovative through creativity;
-Quality and improvement driven;
-Socially responsible;
-Team oriented;

organizationDescription:
Local Milk. High-Quality Products. Better Ethiopia.

Building a brighter tomorrow through dairy products
Holland Dairy is a leading dairy processing company in Ethiopia. Were Ethiopian by nationality and Dutch by technology. We offer a wide array of dairy products with the goal of creating a better Ethiopia both in terms of health and economic growth.

High-Quality Products
We want our customers to know exactly what theyre giving themselves and their families. Since our founding, weve remained committed to the highest-quality dairy processing. In fact, weve developed a reputation as one of the best quality dairy processors in the entire country. We ensure compliance and sustainability before using an Ethiopian milk farm to source our milk. 

Locally Sourced 
Ethiopian dairy farming plays an important role in the economy of many rural communities. To give back to the country that has given us so much, we are dedicated to only sourcing our raw milk from local farms. More importantly, were focusing on smaller farms to really help these local communities thrive. Besides, that means higher-quality products too!

organizationDescription:
Established in 2016 Green Scene Energy is dedicated to delivering affordable, high-quality clean energy solutions to off-grid and weak-grid communities in Ethiopia and across Africa. The products offered by Green Scene are namely; Solar Home Systems and lighting products, Productive Use / Irrigation solutions and EPC services for mini grids installations.
To reach its customers Green Scene Energy partners with retailers, micro finance institutions, telecom operators and farmers associations to distribute the products using pay-as-you-go (PAYGO) financing mechanism.
Starting operations in 2016, Green Scene has sold over 9,000 solar energy products in SNNPR, Amhara and Oromia regions of the Ethiopia. The target markets in the next five years is reaching 600,000 Households across all regions.


Our exceptional expertise, extensive partner network, and local presence ensure that our fully integrated process sustainably meets our clients energy needs:
- Simple-to-use products that work
- Post-distribution product traceability to ensure compliance with carbon credit regulations
- Affordable, flexible payment options and 
- Customizable solutions for a variety of contexts

Our Business Model

organizationDescription:
We are Population Services International (PSI), the worlds leading non-profit social marketing organization. We work to make it easier for people in the developing world to lead healthier lives and plan the families they desire by marketing affordable products and services that range from mosquito nets to contraceptives to HIV testing. We are a $560m enterprise based in Washington, DC, operating in the private and public sectors in more than 65 countries.

PSI Ethiopia is an innovative network member of PSI with a team of more than 140 people passionate about marketing and dedicated to serving Sara! Since 2003, we have marketed products and led programs to prevent HIV, improve reproductive health, and improve child health.  We market condoms and increase condom use among people most at risk of HIV.  We increase access to clean water by selling Wuha Agar, a water disinfectant. At PSI Ethiopia we do more than simply provide products and services, we seek to create true change  buy making markets work for the poor  to increase the use of critical health products and services that are available, affordable, and desirable to the most vulnerable Ethiopian people
organizationSpecialities: Health ,NGO,Social Marketing,WASH,HIV/AIDS Prevention,Reproductive Health,Adolescents,Hypertension,NCD,Family Planning,and Marketing

Watered and nourished the hard dry crusty cover of a seed breaks open giving way to rushing flow of abundant life. A life that possesses the unbridled potential to transform a barren land into a thriving forest.

organizationName: Addis Ababa Chamber of Commerce and Sectoral Associations
organizationDescription:
Background
Established in 1947, AACCSA is a voluntary, non-governmental, business membership organization with more than 18,000 member companies. The chamber serves as a credible voice of business and advocates for the creation of a conducive business environment. It also promotes trade and industry, disseminating business information, consulting government and members on economic development and business issues, establishing friendly relationship with similar chambers in other countries, and exchanging information as well as engaging in arbitration in times of disputes among businesses.

Vision Statement
To be a world class chamber, enabling the business community to be competitive locally and internationally and contribute to the attainment of the trade and investment goals of the country.

Mission Statement
To promote trade and investment by providing demand driven services to the best satisfaction of members, stakeholders and others and advocate for favorable business environment based on best practices.

Values
AACCSAs Core Values  are the heart of all that it does and are reflected in the day to day activities of AACCSA are promoted consistently by the Board and staff.

-Accountable, credible and transparent ;
-Business-friendly;
-Customer-focused;
-Innovative through creativity;
-Quality and improvement driven;
-Socially responsible;
-Team oriented;

Membership Benefits
-Business information and advice
-Business match making
-Market Access
-Networking Opportunities
-Sector specific support  :
-Business Promotion
-Training
-Arbitration Service
-Accreditation
-Improved Management System
organizationSpecialities: Member-based,Business Info,Training,Arbitration,Corporate Governance,Trade Fair,Advocacy,and Media and Communication

organizationDescription: PurposeBlack is a new initiative launched in May 2020 through a collaborative effort of more than 130 Black experts. As the name indicates, PurposeBlack intends to economically resolve some of the principal issues Black people worldwide face. Preparation is well underway to launch the first model of this global initiative in Ethiopia.We strongly believe that the new approach is an excellent opportunity for Ethiopia and Africa to be at the center of a massive international enterprise while benefiting millions of Africans in the process. The PurposeBlack Ethiopia initiative will be a multi-billion Birr endeavor encompassing the construction and launching of a mega agro-processing complex, an e-commerce marketplace, five hypermarkets, ten big supermarkets, a chain of more than 1000 retail and distribution stores all over Ethiopia, and multiple agricultural endeavors established by joint ventures with farmers throughout the country
organizationSpecialities: e-commerce,retail,media,agro-processing,and agriculture

organizationDescription:
Established in 2016 Green Scene Energy is dedicated to delivering affordable, high-quality clean energy solutions to off-grid and weak-grid communities in Ethiopia and across Africa. The products offered by Green Scene are namely; Solar Home Systems and lighting products, Productive Use / Irrigation solutions and EPC services for mini grids installations.
To reach its customers Green Scene Energy partners with retailers, micro finance institutions, telecom operators and farmers associations to distribute the products using pay-as-you-go (PAYGO) financing mechanism.
Starting operations in 2016, Green Scene has sold over 9,000 solar energy products in SNNPR, Amhara and Oromia regions of the Ethiopia. The target markets in the next five years is reaching 600,000 Households across all regions.


Our exceptional expertise, extensive partner network, and local presence ensure that our fully integrated process sustainably meets our clients energy needs:
- Simple-to-use products that work
- Post-distribution product traceability to ensure compliance with carbon credit regulations
- Affordable, flexible payment options and 
- Customizable solutions for a variety of contexts

Our Business Model
The company introduced a new business model named SETT (Solar Energy by Tele Transfer / ) leveraging its partnership with the national telecommunications provider, Ethio Telecom, to pilot, expand and accelerate the availability and affordability of pay-as-you-go (PAYG)-enabled solar systems to off-grid customers for a wide variety of productive uses including lighting, device charging, radio, television, refrigeration and water pumping for irrigation.

Our work Impact: addresses 10 out of 17 Sustainable Development Goals
